posts.author: NoelElvin (Noel Elvin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to set as a permission for users to be able to see task activity log without being an owner on a board.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like for my team to be able to see the activity log on any task they are assigned to since they ned visibility commonly of who changed what and when and from what, etc.
